issues_found.evidence: ffmpeg blackdetect reported black_start:100.967 black_end:101.733 and silencedetect reported trailing silence to end of file
ffprobe measured source duration 101.782s, above the required 88-98s window
first-pass loudnorm measured source at about -27 LUFS integrated

operations.reason: Remove the dead opening, black lead-in, and trailing black/silence while preserving the clap setup, title, examples, and tutorial explanation in original order.
Deliver a standards-compliant 1280x720 H.264/AAC master and raise speech loudness while keeping true peak constrained.

parameters.check_method: Compared the early clap frames against the strongest nearby audio transients and did not find a clear audio/video offset that required correction.

operations.reason: Timing was explicitly checked because the task called for sync repair if needed; no material AV desync was found.

checks_performed: python audio envelope inspection on work/audio.wav
sampled early and end frame sheets for visual review
extracted start/end frame check image for final visual validation

loudness_analysis.note: Speech level was raised substantially from the source; the remaining decoded true-peak reading is effectively at full scale and was accepted after applying a stricter loudnorm true-peak target.

freeze_findings: short holds remain around title/example graphics and still-image inserts; these matched intentional content, not export corruption
